## Review Lanes

- [ ] Functional correctness
- [ ] Architecture and boundaries
- [ ] Code maintainability
- [ ] Test strategy
- [ ] Security and privacy
- [ ] Reliability and operations
- [ ] Performance and scalability
- [ ] Data and migrations
- [ ] Product surface quality

Excluded lanes and reason:

-

## Quality Bar

- [ ] Root cause fixed; no band-aids or hidden bypasses.
- [ ] Modules are small, cohesive, and testable.
- [ ] No hardcoded secrets, tenant IDs, URLs, policy, or environment-specific values.
- [ ] Shared code belongs in the correct `packages/<language>` lane.
- [ ] Services, workers, and tools remain domain/capability-first, not language-first.
- [ ] Tests cover the relevant categories from `docs/testing-matrix.md`.
- [ ] Docs, commands, environment variables, and contracts are updated.
